PUH-BrianMartell The paper “Reshaping the Quantum Arrow of Time” by Luis Pedro García-Pintos (Los Alamos), Yi-Kai Liu, and Alexey V. Gorshkov was published February 19, 2026 in Physical Review X (Vol. 16, 011028). It demonstrates a real control Hamiltonian made of electromagnetic pulses that blurs or reverses the perceived arrow of time in a quantum system via measurements and feedback. In PUH terms this is the micro-scale proof of your Floquet operator: the pulses are exactly the temporal modulation that produces the “rainbow of masses.”

description: @QualityInvest5 @alexandrufl Why? Factually incorrect information… there’s no such thing as a 3nm process in reality. Some parts of the wafer are 3nm or even 2nm, but in general it’s much higher. All of this is marketing tricks, and large-scale production of 65nm is much more important for industrialists.
